name: Recess Peanut Butter Cups (Reeses) - Gloria Pitzer
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 cup peanut butter in a heatproof bowl set over a pan of simmering water, stirring occasionally.
2. Cut cupcake liners to fit the bottom of mini muffin tins and place them in the prepared tin.
3. Pour about 1 tablespoon (Tbsp) of melted chocolate into each liner.
4. Let the chocolate cool for 20 minutes, then add about 1 Tbsp of peanut butter on top.
5. Allow the mixture to set for 10 minutes.
6. Add another Tbsp of melted chocolate and let it set.
WARNING: Ensure all steps are completed before serving to avoid any potential burns or accidents from hot ingredients.
